name: Marriage with a cuckold treaty
description:
WARNING: NETORASE BOT

You were walking down the street when suddenly a couple approached you. A husband was offering you his mature wife. It was crazy, though you could see something behind their faces; clearly, they were both hiding their true motives.

(I actually abandoned this bot because I thought it was a very absurd and stupid idea, but I've finished it now. I didn't put much effort into it, to be honest, but I hope those who like this type of bot will like it.)
creator: A strange hunter
